products-services.title: Products and Services
products-services.prompt: What specific product or service goes into the sentence?

customer-segment.title: Customer Segment
customer-segment.prompt: Which specific customer segment does this sentence serve?
examples: Solo product designers at SaaS companies

jobs-to-be-done.title: Jobs to Be Done
jobs-to-be-done.prompt: What specific job is this customer trying to get done?
examples: Ship product specs to engineering without rework
Stay compliant with state-by-state insurance regulations
Onboard a junior dev in under a week

pain-verb.title: Verb (e.g. reducing, avoiding)
pain-verb.prompt: Which verb explains how you relieve the pain?

customer-pain.title: A customer pain
customer-pain.prompt: Which specific pain do you reduce or avoid?
examples: the cost of unplanned database downtime
weeks lost to manual claim filing
endless review cycles for design specs

gain-verb.title: Verb (e.g. increasing, enabling)
gain-verb.prompt: Which verb explains how you create the gain?

customer-gain.title: A customer gain
customer-gain.prompt: Which specific gain do you increase or enable?

competing-value-proposition.title: Competing value proposition
competing-value-proposition.prompt: What do customers use today instead of you?
examples: annual fleet insurance with mile estimates
